Metadata.title: Prime Land For Sale | Hua Hin Soi 112 | 4 Rai 2 Ngan Chanote
Metadata.description: 4 Rai 2 Ngan flat buildable land with panoramic mountain views in Hua Hin's prestigious Soi 112 corridor. Chanote title deed. Water connection in place. ฿2,300,000/rai. General information only — not legal or financial advice. Verify all property details independently.

homepage.lifestyleSub: Live music every night. Golf at sunrise. Fresh seafood by the ocean. A warm, genuinely international community of people who chose the good life — and found it in Hua Hin.
homepage.nightlifeQuote: The social scene you actually want to be part of.
homepage.neighbourSub: Botanica Hua Hin — a completed luxury villa development — chose this exact corridor. That benchmark confirms what discerning buyers already know about Soi 112.
homepage.why1: Freehold Chanote title deed — strongest ownership in Thailand
homepage.why4: Soi 112 luxury corridor — Botanica, La Felice, Mali Prestige
homepage.why5: 4 rai 2 ngan in one piece — rare at this size
homepage.why6: Below market price vs every comparable plot
homepage.devSub: 4 Rai 2 Ngan in one piece offers exceptional flexibility for development.
homepage.devLiveDesc: Build your villa on 1 rai. Sell the remaining plots. Pool villas on Soi 112 start at ฿15M+. Your land cost per plot under ฿2.5M.
homepage.devBoutiqueDesc: Develop 4–5 luxury pool villas for sale or holiday rental. Rental yields in Hua Hin average 6–10% per year.
homepage.devEstateDesc: Keep the full plot. Main villa, guest house, large pool, tropical gardens — all with unobstructed mountain views.
homepage.reachSub: Thap Tai, Soi 112 — at the heart of it all
homepage.sevenSub: Coffee at 6am. Cold beer at 10pm. Bills paid, phone topped up, medicine when you need it. Thailand's 7-Eleven is not a convenience store — it's infrastructure.
homepage.nearbySon: The Son Resort — best rated nearby
